positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is displayed on the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated on the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page content is still visible
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out and redirected to the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or menu option
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify the login form is displayed and the user is no longer authenticated
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password characters are masked during input and login is successful
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Click on the password input field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the entered characters are masked/hidden (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Password field masks input characters for security

positive_scenarios.expected_result: An already authenticated user attempting to visit the login page is automatically redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Manually navigate back to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify that an already authenticated user is automatically redirected away from the login page to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Login page redirects authenticated user away from login page

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login form is submitted successfully via the Enter key and user is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Press the 'Enter' key on the keyboard instead of clicking the Login button
Verify the login form is submitted
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login using keyboard Enter key submission

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are shown for both empty username and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g. 'Username is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password fields

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid username or password' or 'Incorrect credentials'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected due to invalid email format and a relevant validation error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalid-email-format' (without @ or domain) in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Please enter a valid email address' or 'Invalid email format'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the password field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Password is required' or 'Please enter your password'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected for a non-existent account and an appropriate error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistent_user_xyz_99999@fakeemail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'SomePassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid username or password' or 'Account not found'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with unregistered/non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection attempt, rejects the login, and does not expose any vulnerabilities or database errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter 'AnyPassword123' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed or the input is sanitized
Verify the application does not expose any database errors or sensitive information
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection string in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the username/email field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Username is required' or 'Please enter your email'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed; whitespace-only passwords are not treated as valid input
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter '          ' (10 whitespace/space characters) in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials or that the password cannot be blank/whitespace
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with password containing only whitespace characters
